description_long: This is a robust wooden storage box with a weathered, rustic appearance, featuring a prominent X-brace design on each side. The box is constructed from thick, horizontal wooden planks, reinforced at the edges and corners with additional wooden framing. The wood shows signs of aging and exposure, with visible grain, knots, and a range of brown tones, suggesting it is suitable for outdoor or heavy-duty use. The top surface is flat and solid, likely designed to support stacking or placement of other objects. There are no visible handles, locks, or labeling areas, giving it a utilitarian and unadorned look. The box is likely hollow inside, intended for storing or transporting goods in urban or industrial environments.
description: A weathered wooden storage box with X-brace sides and a flat, solid top, designed for rugged use and stacking.
description_view_0: Front view shows the X-brace wooden design with visible grain and a slightly lighter wood tone.
description_view_1: Side view displays similar X-brace construction, with darker wood coloration and more pronounced weathering.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, with a consistent X-brace pattern and uniform plank arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the X-brace and wood texture, with subtle differences in wood grain and color.
